text: This is the VOA Special English Agriculture Report.
zh: 这里是美国之音特别英语农业报道。

text: Pigweed is a weed that spreads fast and grows up to two meters tall.
zh: 猪草是一种蔓延迅速、可长到两米高的杂草。

text: It can overpower cotton and other crops.
zh: 它能压制棉花和其他农作物的生长。

text: It comes from the amaranth family and is also known as Palmer amaranth or Palmer's pigweed.
zh: 它属于苋科植物,也被称为帕尔默苋或帕尔默猪草。

text: A cultivated version of amaranth is grown for food and medicine in Africa and Asia.
zh: 苋菜的栽培品种在非洲和亚洲被用作食物和药材种植。

text: In the United States, some people buy amaranth as a gluten -free substitute for wheat flour.
zh: 在美国,有些人购买苋菜作为不含麸质的小麦粉替代品。

text: But wild pigweed is a big problem in cotton -growing states in the South.
zh: 但野生猪草在南方产棉州是个大问题。

text: And now the plant is spreading into the Midwest.
zh: 而现在这种植物正蔓延到中西部地区。

text: West.
zh: 西部。

text: In many cases, the pigweed is killing genetically modified cotton and soybeans.
zh: 在很多情况下,猪草正在使转基因棉花和大豆枯死。

text: For years, farmers could control it by spraying with Roundup or glyphosate made by Monsanto.
zh: 多年来,农民一直靠喷洒孟山都公司生产的农达(草甘膦)来控制它。

text: But weed scientist William Curran at Pennsylvania State University says over the past three or four years,
zh: 但宾夕法尼亚州立大学的杂草科学家威廉·柯伦表示,在过去三四年里,

text: pigweed has become resistant to glyphosate.
zh: 猪草已经对草甘膦产生了抗药性。

text: Now farmers in some areas can no longer depend on that popular herbicide alone to defend against pigweed.
zh: 现在一些地区的农民不能再仅仅依赖这种流行除草剂来对付猪草了。

text: He says farmers can try other herbicides or they can mix another herbicide with Roundup and use the mixture when they would normally spray their fields.
zh: 他说农民可以尝试其他除草剂,或者将另一种除草剂与农达混合,在通常喷洒农田时使用这种混合剂。

text: The reality is even though we have this weed,
zh: 现实情况是,尽管我们有这种杂草,

text: this one weed that is resistant, there's still a lot of other weeds that Roundup still kills.
zh: 这种具有抗药性的杂草,农达仍然能消灭许多其他杂草。

text: Farmers in the American Northeast face a growing threat from another weed.
zh: 美国东北部的农民正面临另一种杂草日益增长的威胁。

text: Scientists call it horse weed.
zh: 科学家称它为加拿大蓬。

text: Farmers call it mare's tail.
zh: 农民称它为马尾草。

text: Like pigweed, this plant has also developed the ability to resist glyphosate.
zh: 和猪草一样,这种植物也已发展出抵抗草甘膦的能力。

text: Professor Curran sees one major reason for this.
zh: 柯伦教授认为这背后有一个主要原因。

text: Farmers are depending too much on individual products and not enough on different strategies to manage weeds.
zh: 农民过度依赖单一产品,而没有采用足够多样的策略来管理杂草。

text: The The question, he says, is how best to use a system of integrated pest management to control weeds.
zh: 他说,问题在于如何最好地利用综合虫害管理体系来控制杂草。

text: For example, IPM calls for farmers to rotate their crops instead of planting the same ones in the same soil year after year.
zh: 例如,综合虫害管理提倡农民轮作作物,而不是年复一年在同一块地里种植同样的作物。

text: Professor Curran says farmers should also consider planting cover crops.
zh: 柯伦教授说农民还应考虑种植覆盖作物。

text: crops.
zh: 作物。

text: These crops are grown temporarily to protect the soil.
zh: 这些作物是临时种植用来保护土壤的。

text: For instance, planting rye in the fall can suppress horseweed.
zh: 例如,秋天种植黑麦可以抑制加拿大蓬的生长。

text: If you have winter rye out there occupying that space, it's very competitive and the horseweed is less successful in establishing.
zh: 如果那片地里种着冬黑麦占据空间,它的竞争力很强,加拿大蓬就更难扎根生长。

text: In the next two or three years, several companies expect to have new herbicides along with crops that can survive spraying with those chemicals.
zh: 未来两三年内,几家公司预计将推出新型除草剂,以及能够耐受这些化学品喷洒的农作物。

text: And that's the VOA Special English Agriculture Report.
zh: 以上就是美国之音特别英语农业报道。

text: If you have a farm, tell us how you manage weeds.
zh: 如果你经营农场,欢迎告诉我们你是如何管理杂草的。

text: Share your comments at voaspecialenglish .com.
zh: 请在voaspecialenglish.com分享你的看法。

text: For VOA Special English, I'm Carolyn Prosutti.
zh: 我是卡罗琳·普罗苏蒂,这里是美国之音特别英语。
